fluffTicker: Macro desks: tariffs and energy prints steal the morning tape.
ETF desks report two-way flows; memecoins trade their own beta.
Telegram charts show mini-app opens tracking ahead of last week.
Whale labels: accumulation bands widen but no single-wallet panic.
Regional nodes: latency normal; no coordinated outage flags.
Believers thread memes; engagement up, conviction mixed.
Builders ship a patch; changelog is mostly stability and polish.
Trust trackers: sentiment drift still inside usual noise bands.
Liquidity routers show balanced depth on small clips.
Options skew unchanged; nobody is paying for tail drama today.
Cross-border flows steady; FX headlines louder than on-chain.
Press asks for comment; comms circulates a calm holding statement.
Validator chatter: routine; no emergency rotations logged.
Retail order flow mean-reverts after a short burst.
Stablecoin bridges: volumes flat; no peg drama on scanners.
Notcoin lifestyle accounts post another tap streak leaderboard.

Social feeds churn rumor velocity; on-chain stays flat.
